adaptive_kt_comparator.estimator: order-1 KT (alpha=0.5) over the macro-rewritten stream (tools.ppm_ref.adaptive_code).
adaptive_kt_comparator.reading: The from-scratch context model captures nearly all of the recurrence; the transferred vocabulary's KT gain is small -- the mandatory deflation of the counting-currency headline (§13.2).

bootstrap_ci.variance_scope: POPULATION over readings only; authoring-stability variance (run-to-run certification) NOT estimated (needs >= 2 authoring passes / real spend); n=1 authoring draw.

counting_currency.model_bits_note: macro-definition cost; EXCLUDED per §13.2 (sunk, in-sample). With model bits included the frozen table's total on H is 812.0 > 645.0 (empty) -- it does NOT pay as an admission.

frozen_table_T.name: governed refined+GC census-of-record (8 macros)
frozen_table_T.reconstruction: tools.measure_cluster_key replay (refined greedy + gc_table) over the frozen checkpoint's governed waves; bodies rebuilt, summary digest verified.

holdout_H.selection: certified Euclid holdout (source_id 'h*'); dreams and non-certified excluded.

model_qualification.author_pipeline: wp-met/1 ungoverned arm (the metered holdout authoring draw); one authoring pass (n=1).

verdict: Within-domain transfer readout, model-qualified (claude-opus-4-8, wp-met/1 author pipeline, Euclid holdout = the certified Euclid IX arithmetic propositions (h13-h20; the VII definitions did not certify and are excluded, so transfer is measured on the arithmetic-proposition subset only), n=8 certified readings, n=1 authoring draw). In the counting currency the frozen 8-macro census-of-record table (digest ce5cb03fe2c5bdad) saves 86.0 DATA bits repricing the unseen holdout vs the empty table -- a POSITIVE within-domain transfer signal. What transfers is GENERIC STRUCTURAL BOILERPLATE, not the even/odd content: the macro carrying nearly all of it (m_5cfe6695215f, matching 7 of the 8 readings) is a bare 'two consecutive Int object declarations' idiom -- it matches ANY two Int variable declarations and is blind to even/odd (h20, whose vars are Nat, misses it and is instead touched by an atomic-hypothesis-pair macro that abstracts the even/odd operator to a free parameter). The trained pipeline's recurring declaration/hypothesis SHAPES recur in unseen Euclid sources; the domain-specific even/odd reasoning is NOT what compresses. Model bits (253.0) are EXCLUDED per §13.2 (sunk, in-sample); that exclusion is load-bearing -- with the macro-definition cost included the small holdout does NOT pay for the table, so this is a transfer readout, not an admission. The mandatory adaptive-KT comparator DEFLATES the headline: an order-1 KT context model codes H from scratch at 737.9819 bits and only 733.7474 under the transferred vocabulary -- a 4.235-bit gain -- i.e. the context model learns almost all of the recurrence the macros encode, so the vocabulary barely beats learning-from-scratch. Claim, un-inflated: the trained vocabulary transfers within-domain to unseen Euclid sources under the same authoring model in the counting currency, but the transfer is marginal under a from-scratch context model and does not survive charging its own model bits. Never 'generalization' simpliciter -- same domain, same transcription conventions, same authoring model. Authoring-stability variance is unestimated (n=1).
what_this_is: One-shot deterministic LLM-free repricing of the already-authored Euclid holdout under the frozen trained table vs the empty table; counting currency + adaptive-KT comparator; model bits excluded (sunk, in-sample).
